'''Gargonn''' the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] was a very powerful [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] and sponsor of the [[Circus Horrificus/Legends|Circus Horrificus]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].

==Biography==
[[File:GargonnBrain-SWREP18.png|thumb|left|180px|The wound exposing Gargonn's cranial cavity]]
Surviving on the streets of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] by performing tricks and eating rats, Gargonn lost the right side of his head after being attacked by a [[wandrella]] on [[Mimban/Legends|Circarpous V]]. Developing a small entertainment business, he eventually fell into the trade of endangered and exotic [[Plant/Legends|plants]] and animals.

During their [[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (32 BBY)|mission]] to Nar Shaddaa to investigate the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] of [[Akk dog/Legends|akk dogs]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]] questioned him, and determined him to be the ring leader. After a brief mix up with [[Mutant akk dog|mutated akk dogs]], the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] escaped, though lost Gargonn. The two Jedi speculated that Gargonn's head would heal within one hundred [[Standard year/Legends|years]].
